## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, publishing workflow, and social media integration.](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy progressing well; ramping up to \~10 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Social media repurposing of content has begun, with plans to expand across multiple platforms](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Transitioning to Sunbit team publishing content, with potential for automation](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [SEO improvements planned: adding category navigation, internal linking, and metadata optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Publishing

  - [Aiming to produce \~10 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [GrowthX to hand off publishing to Sunbit team in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Potential for automated publishing workflow using forms/Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [B2B topics from SEM team research to be incorporated](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)

### Social Media Integration

  - [Repurposing blog content for social media posts](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Creating graphics and snippets to drive traffic to articles](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Platforms: Facebook (2 accounts), Instagram (2 accounts), LinkedIn, X, TikTok](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Segmented strategy: B2B2C approach with tailored content per platform](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Exploring video content creation for TikTok and Reels](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)

### SEO Optimization

  - [Adding category navigation (e.g., "dental tips," "automotive tips") to improve crawlability](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Implementing when 3+ articles per category are available](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Using Yoast plugin (free version sufficient)](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Optimizing meta descriptions for search and social sharing](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Adding related articles for internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

### Analytics and Reporting

  - [GrowthX to build Looker Studio dashboard for content performance](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Separate from existing Sunbit analytics](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Will show performance from zero baseline](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ramp up content production to \~10 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [GrowthX to build Looker Studio dashboard for content analytics](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Sunbit to review and provide feedback on new batch of articles](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Jason to share social media content planning sheet with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [GrowthX to create 10 more social media posts based on Sunbit's template](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Implement category navigation on website when sufficient content is available](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Optimize metadata and internal linking for published articles](https://fathom.video/share/ncxy8uovVm4cVL1F2RD3wqC5ZVRD3SWx?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
